title: i18n: localize Instance Settings → General page (ZAI-152)
description:
## Scope
The Instance Settings → General page (http://127.0.0.1:3105/instance/settings/general) is rendered in Russian locale but most strings are still English. The user specifically asked for ru localization (Eng → Rus). Per project_localization_round3 memory, please cover all 8 locales (en, ru, de, es, pt, uk, zh, el) so we do not regress the round-3 8-locale sweep.

## File to wire through i18n
-  — currently has hardcoded English strings. Needs a new namespace (e.g., ) wired through  / .

## Strings observed un-translated on the page (non-exhaustive)
Section headers and labels still in English:
-  (h1), , , , , , , , 
- , , 
- , , 
- , , , , , , , , , , , , , 
- , , , , , , , , 
- , , 

Confirmed by grep: ui/src/pages/InstanceGeneralSettings.tsx lines 90, 107, 115, 126, 130, 140, 159, 177, 186, 215, 245, 279, 305, 310, 355, 357, 367.

## Acceptance criteria
1. All visible strings on  resolved through  (no hardcoded English literals in JSX).
2. Translation files updated for all 8 locales: en, ru, de, es, pt, uk, zh, el.
3. Manual sweep in Russian locale shows zero English leaks on the page (header, sub-pages? no — scope is only this page).
4. No regressions on the page in English locale.
5. Per board memory: "WARN with leakage = FAIL" — open the sweep report file and confirm zero leaks before marking done.

## Notes
- Parent ZAI-152 is the user-facing report (in Russian). User screenshot only shows /instance/settings/general; do not balloon scope to other pages.
- Use the same translation conventions established in ZAI-138/ZAI-139 round 3.
- When done, leave a summary comment on the child and reassign to CEO for review.

## Verification (required before marking done)
- Run a Playwright/QA sweep in  locale across the page.
- Attach the sweep report.

This issue was opened by CEO on behalf of board issue ZAI-152.
